title: 启用与调用来宾集成服务
title_en: Enable and Invoke Guest Integration Services
code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- 创建第二代测试虚拟机 ---
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_guest_service_control'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null); if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|select -First 1
# --- 配置面:定位来宾服务接口设置数据并启用(EnabledState 2=启用/3=禁用) ---
$gs=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData')|select -First 1
$gs.EnabledState=[uint16]2
$mr=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings(@($gs.GetText(1))); if($mr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $mr.Job|Out-Null}   # ReturnValue=0 表示成功
$gs2=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData')|select -First 1  # 读回确认 EnabledState=2
# --- 运行面:StartService/StopService(CIM_Service 生命周期方法, ValueMap 0=完成 1=不支持) ---
# 可调用 Start/Stop 的是运行态设备实例 Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent / Msvm_GuestFileService
# (Msvm_GuestService 为抽象基类)。该设备仅在虚拟机运行且来宾内集成服务已加载时才出现:
$live=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Query "SELECT * FROM Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent WHERE SystemName='$($vm.Name)'"
if(@($live).Count -gt 0){
  $svc=[wmi](@($live)[0].__PATH)
  $svc.StartService().ReturnValue   # 0 表示成功
  ([wmi](@($live)[0].__PATH)).StopService().ReturnValue
}
# --- 清理 ---
$del=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($del.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $del.Job|Out-Null}
code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- Create a generation 2 test VM ---
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_guest_service_control'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null); if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|select -First 1
# --- Configuration plane: locate the guest service interface setting data and enable it (EnabledState 2=Enabled/3=Disabled) ---
$gs=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData')|select -First 1
$gs.EnabledState=[uint16]2
$mr=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings(@($gs.GetText(1))); if($mr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $mr.Job|Out-Null}   # ReturnValue=0 indicates success
$gs2=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData')|select -First 1  # Read back to confirm EnabledState=2
# --- Runtime plane: StartService/StopService (CIM_Service lifecycle methods, ValueMap 0=Completed 1=Not supported) ---
# Start/Stop can be called on the runtime device instances Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent / Msvm_GuestFileService
# (Msvm_GuestService is an abstract base class). This device appears only when the VM is running and the in-guest integration services are loaded:
$live=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Query "SELECT * FROM Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent WHERE SystemName='$($vm.Name)'"
if(@($live).Count -gt 0){
  $svc=[wmi](@($live)[0].__PATH)
  $svc.StartService().ReturnValue   # 0 indicates success
  ([wmi](@($live)[0].__PATH)).StopService().ReturnValue
}
# --- Cleanup ---
$del=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($del.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $del.Job|Out-Null}
output:
VM_CREATED=WMITEST_guest_service_control Name=C6EA8DD2-78CA-432A-8BC3-C37A00C097ED
GS_SETTING_FOUND ES=3 InstanceID=Microsoft:C6EA8DD2-78CA-432A-8BC3-C37A00C097ED\6C09BB55-D683-4DA0-8931-C9BF705F6480
ENABLE_ModifyResourceSettings_RV=0
GS_SETTING_READBACK ES=2
LIVE_GUEST_SERVICE_DEVICE_COUNT=0
START_STOP=NOT_APPLICABLE (live device requires a running guest OS with integration services)
ASSERT=PASS (guest service enabled; Start/StopService target = running-guest live device)
CLEANUP=DestroySystem_rv=4096
NO_RESIDUAL
notes: Msvm_GuestService 为抽象基类,自身无独立属性,仅提供从 CIM_Service 继承的 StartService/StopService 方法(ValueMap:0=Completed with No Error,1=Not supported)。
StartService/StopService 作用于运行态设备实例:Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent(来宾集成服务接口)及其子类 Msvm_GuestFileService(文件复制服务)。这些设备实例仅在虚拟机处于运行态且来宾内集成服务组件已加载时,才出现在 root\virtualization\v2 命名空间中。
无来宾操作系统的空虚拟机不存在任何 Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent 设备实例(按 SystemName 查询计数为 0),因此无法执行 Start/Stop,应记为不适用而非功能不支持。

启用或禁用来宾服务的配置入口是 Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData(隶属于虚拟机设置数据 VSSD),修改其 EnabledState(2=启用/3=禁用)后经 ModifyResourceSettings 下发,ReturnValue=0 表示成功,可读回 EnabledState 确认。此操作等价于 PowerShell 的 Enable-VMIntegrationService -Name 'Guest Service Interface'。
需区分配置面与运行面:配置面的设置数据(SettingData)始终存在,运行面的设备实例(Component)仅在运行态出现。对刚经 DefineSystem 创建的虚拟机,通过 GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent') 无法获取设备实例。
若需观察 StartService/StopService 的返回码,需启动一台已安装 Hyper-V 集成服务的来宾操作系统的虚拟机。
notes_en: Msvm_GuestService is an abstract base class with no properties of its own; it only exposes the StartService/StopService methods inherited from CIM_Service (ValueMap: 0=Completed with No Error, 1=Not supported).

StartService/StopService act on the runtime device instances: Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent (the guest integration service interface) and its subclass Msvm_GuestFileService (the file copy service). These device instances appear in the root\virtualization\v2 namespace only when the VM is in a running state and the in-guest integration service component is loaded.

An empty VM with no guest operating system has no Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent device instance (a query by SystemName returns a count of 0), so Start/Stop cannot be executed; this should be recorded as not applicable rather than as a functional non-support.

The configuration entry point for enabling or disabling the guest service is Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData (belonging to the VM setting data, VSSD). After modifying its EnabledState (2=Enabled/3=Disabled), the change is committed via ModifyResourceSettings; ReturnValue=0 indicates success, and EnabledState can be read back to confirm. This operation is equivalent to the PowerShell command Enable-VMIntegrationService -Name 'Guest Service Interface'.

The configuration plane and the runtime plane must be distinguished: the setting data (SettingData) on the configuration plane always exists, whereas the device instance (Component) on the runtime plane appears only in a running state. For a VM just created via DefineSystem, GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponent') cannot obtain a device instance.
To observe the return codes of StartService/StopService, a VM running a guest operating system with the Hyper-V integration services installed must be started.
